headline: A Look At Mondelez International (MDLZ) Valuation After Its Strong First Quarter 2026 Results
summary: Mondelez International (MDLZ) caught investors’ attention after its first quarter 2026 earnings, reporting sales of US$10.08b and net income of US$560m, while management kept full-year guidance unchanged despite ongoing cost and geopolitical pressures. See our latest analysis for Mondelez International. The Q1 earnings beat and reaffirmed guidance have helped improve sentiment, with a 7.5% 30 day share price return and 14.4% year to date share price return. However, the 1 year total...
